description_long: This is a modern L-shaped chaise with a deep navy blue fabric upholstery, featuring a left-side extended lounge section and a three-seat main section. The backrest is straight and segmented into three distinct, evenly sized cushions, providing ample support and a clean, contemporary look. The armrests are present on both ends, with the left armrest being shorter to accommodate the chaise extension, and the right armrest running the full depth of the seat. The legs are slim, straight, and made of dark wood, slightly elevating the piece and adding a touch of elegance. The upholstery appears smooth and solid, with no visible patterns or tufting, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. This chaise is designed for comfort and style, suitable for urban living rooms, lounges, or upscale waiting areas.
description: A modern L-shaped navy blue chaise with segmented back cushions, slim dark wood legs, and smooth solid upholstery, featuring both left and right armrests.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the L-shape, three back cushions, left-side chaise extension, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the left armrest, and the extended lounge section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the straight, segmented backrest and the alignment of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the right armrest and the full length of the chaise extension.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight, medium-height, and divided into three evenly sized, rectangular cushions, providing a clean and modern appearance with no visible tufting or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides; the left armrest is shorter to accommodate the chaise extension, while the right armrest is full-length and straight.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are slim, straight, and made of dark wood, with a simple, modern design and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid navy blue fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are three large, attached back cushions and three seat cushions, with the leftmost seat cushion extending forward to form the chaise lounge section; all cushions are rectangular and evenly arranged.
